title: Nio to report Q1 earnings on May 21 after deliveries beat guidance
text: Company will report unaudited first-quarter results before U.S. markets open May 21 with management hosting earnings call at 8 a.m. ET. NIO faces crucial earnings report with expectations for $3.55 billion revenue and 46.67% improvement in EPS. First-quarter revenue previously guided range of 24.48-25.17 billion yuan ($3.6 billion), representing 103.4%-109.2% increase compared to same period in 2025. Nio delivered 83,465 vehicles in Q1 2026, up 98.3% year-over-year, topping company's prior delivery guidance of 80,000-83,000 vehicles. Earnings may focus on margin quality rather than delivery growth alone. If Nio shows resilient gross margin and vehicle margin in lower-volume quarter, investors may view fourth-quarter profit milestone as part of broader turn. Q4 2024 showed vehicle margin 18.1%, gross margin 17.5%, net profit RMB 282.7 million.
